rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Kim Bokholm, Patrik Olson
rule_metadata.title: TokenFlare Phishing Kit

rules.rule_text:
title: TokenFlare Phishing Kit
id: 7626e908-3d98-43b3-b6f7-2fa7da94cebd
description: 'TokenFlare is an attacker-in-the-middle phishing kit targeting Microsoft
  / Entra ID.

  It''s open source and built to be deployed as a Cloudflare Worker.'
references:
- https://github.com/JumpsecLabs/TokenFlare#easy-iocs-for-blue-teams
- https://labs.jumpsec.com/tokenflare-serverless-AiTM-phishing-in-under-60-seconds/
status: test
author: NTT Security - Kim Bokholm, Patrik Olson
date: 2026-02-09
logsource:
  product: azure
  category: sigininlogs
detection:
  selection:
    userAgent|startswith: TokenFlare/
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unlikely
level: medium
tags:
- attack.initial-access
- attack.t1566.002
